prompt.content:
Use the attached doctor cost, drug cost, and treatment record files to determine the state-specific 2025 average price per session and cost per session for each state modeled in the financial model. Assume the doctor and drug costs are the only relevant costs.

Update the financial model with these state-specific price per session and cost per session figures to create an updated estimate for 2026 Revenues, COGS, and Gross Margin. Assume the calculated 2025 average price per session and cost per session values are comprehensive, and that they will apply in 2026.

Return a console message with the 2025 margin per session for each state in the financial model, and the updated overall 2026 Revenue, COGS, and Gross Margin values from the updated financial model. Report dollar values rounded to the nearest $ and percentage values rounded to the nearest 0.01%.

messages.content: States that the per session margin in 2025 in Illinois is any other value than -12.50%.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
